faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I remove the watermark from a Meta AI or Kling AI video?
faq.a1: Simply copy your video URL from Meta AI or Kling AI, paste it into our free downloader tool above, and click Download. ClipVidSaver automatically acts as a watermark remover, processing and providing an HD MP4 without any platform logos.
faq.q2: Is this AI video downloader really free?
faq.a2: Yes, ClipVidSaver is completely 100% free forever. No sign-ups, no hidden costs, and no limits on the number of Meta AI or Kling AI videos you can download and save to your mobile or PC.
faq.q3: Does this tool work on iPhone and Android?
faq.a3: Absolutely! Our AI video saver is fully optimized for mobile devices. Just open clipvidsaver.online in Safari or Chrome on your smartphone to download watermark-free videos directly to your camera roll.
faq.q4: Will downloading compress or reduce the video quality?
faq.a4: Never. We directly extract the highest resolution native source file from the AI generator's servers (Meta AI, Kling AI, etc.). The MP4 you download is the exact same framerate, audio quality, and HD resolution as the original generation.
faq.a5: Yes, we prioritize your privacy. We do not store, track, or keep copies of the videos you download. All processing happens in real-time, delivering the file straight to your device.
